summary: Phase 2 HeroSection frontend testing complete. All features working correctly — tag pill, headline with orange accent, subtext, form validation, loading state, and success/confirmation card all verified.

issues: 'Free.' span computed color returned rgba(255,255,255,0.45) in Playwright evaluation — visually appears white and bold correctly in screenshot. May be a CSS specificity/cascade ordering issue between Tailwind @layer base body override and inline var(--text-primary). No visual defect observed.

critical_code_review_comments: index.css has two :root blocks — one custom Scrutin block and one Tailwind @layer base block. The Tailwind @layer base body rule (@apply bg-background text-foreground) could conflict with the custom body { background-color: var(--bg-primary) } rule. Currently no visual issue but worth consolidating.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 HeroSection complete. All 11 test cases passed: tag pill with orange dot, H1 with orange 'worth building.', subtext with 'Free.' bold white (visual), form with all 4 fields, validation errors for missing idea and email, loading state with 'Launching agents...' disabled button, confirmation card with 'Agents deployed.' and submitted email. Form submission is MOCKED via 1800ms setTimeout. Background #120f0a confirmed. --accent-orange CSS variable defined as #c8622a.
mocked_apis: Form submission is MOCKED — uses setTimeout(1800ms) instead of real API call. No actual /api/validate-idea endpoint called.
